vision_profile.current_state: A motivated individual eager to start a career in IT support.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Lack of structured technical knowledge and practical experience in IT systems and troubleshooting.
vision_profile.top_motivation: To gain the essential skills to resolve technical issues, support users, and build a foundation for a successful IT career.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: The learner can diagnose basic hardware/software issues, navigate operating systems, and use common IT support tools to assist users.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building the essential bedrock of IT knowledge, becoming the first point of contact for technical assistance.

project.title: Setup & Troubleshoot a Small Office Network
project.description: Design and configure a basic network for a small office, including client workstations and a shared printer. Implement basic security measures and troubleshoot common connectivity issues.
project.deliverable: A network diagram, configuration files for network devices (simulated), and a troubleshooting report detailing resolved issues.
seeded_errors: A misconfigured DHCP server causes IP address conflicts for client machines, leading to intermittent connectivity.

science.desc: A user reports their computer is running extremely slow and applications are crashing. Diagnose the potential hardware or software issues using system tools.

scenario.title: Using CLI to Diagnose Network Issues

science.desc: Describe your process for troubleshooting a user's computer that cannot connect to the internet. What steps would you take, and what tools would you use?

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: The learner can configure network devices, manage user accounts and permissions, and troubleshoot common network and system issues.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming the go-to expert for network connectivity and foundational system administration, ensuring seamless operations.

project.title: Implement & Secure a Departmental Network Segment
project.description: Configure a dedicated network segment for a new department, including VLANs, basic firewall rules, and user access controls. Ensure secure and efficient communication.
project.deliverable: Detailed network configuration documentation, firewall rule sets, and a report on user access testing.
seeded_errors: An incorrect subnet mask configuration prevents devices in one VLAN from communicating with devices in another, despite correct routing rules.

science.desc: A critical business application is experiencing intermittent connectivity issues, but other services on the same network segment are fine. How would you isolate and diagnose the problem?
A new employee needs access to shared network drives and specific applications. Outline the steps you would take to set up their user account and grant appropriate permissions.

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: The learner can apply advanced troubleshooting techniques, manage IT incidents effectively, and protect systems from common cybersecurity threats.
milestones.identity_statement: You are evolving into a skilled problem-solver, capable of dissecting complex technical issues and safeguarding digital assets.

project.title: Develop & Implement an Incident Response Plan
project.description: Create a basic incident response plan for common IT issues (e.g., malware infection, network outage). Simulate an incident and document the steps taken for resolution and prevention.
project.deliverable: An incident response plan document, a simulated incident report, and a post-mortem analysis.
seeded_errors: The initial incident response plan fails to account for data isolation, leading to potential spread of a simulated malware infection to other systems.

skills.title: Remote Desktop & Monitoring Tools
lessons: Using RDP & SSH for Remote Access

scenario.title: Diagnosing a Server Performance Bottleneck Remotely
Responding to a Suspected Malware Outbreak

science.desc: A critical server goes offline unexpectedly during peak business hours. Outline your immediate actions and the information you would gather to diagnose and resolve the outage.

scenario.title: Responding to a User Who Clicked a Malicious Link
Assisting a User with MFA Setup Issues

science.desc: A user reports receiving suspicious emails asking for their login credentials. How would you advise them, and what steps would you take to investigate and prevent future occurrences?

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: The learner can support cloud-based services, apply IT service management principles, and deliver exceptional customer service in a modern IT environment.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming a vital link in the modern IT landscape, bridging user needs with cloud solutions and structured service delivery.

project.title: Migrate On-Premise Application to a Cloud Service (Simulated)
project.description: Plan and simulate the migration of a small on-premise application to a cloud-based platform (e.g., a simple web server to AWS EC2 or Azure VM). Configure basic cloud resources and ensure connectivity.
project.deliverable: A migration plan, cloud resource configuration scripts (e.g., Terraform/CloudFormation snippets), and a post-migration verification report.
seeded_errors: Incorrect security group rules in the cloud environment prevent external access to the migrated application, despite the application running correctly.

skills.title: Cloud Computing Concepts
lessons: Introduction to Cloud Models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS)
Public vs. Private vs. Hybrid Cloud

scenario.title: Advising on Cloud Service Selection for a New Application
Troubleshooting a Virtual Machine Performance Issue
Resolving a SaaS Application Integration Error

science.desc: A user reports that a critical SaaS application is inaccessible. The vendor status page shows no issues. How would you investigate and what steps would you take to restore service?

scenario.title: Implementing a Change Request for a Critical System

science.desc: How do you prioritize multiple incoming support requests, especially when some users are more vocal than others? Describe your approach to managing expectations and delivering timely solutions.

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: The learner can monitor system health, automate routine tasks, and implement basic backup and recovery strategies to maintain IT infrastructure.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now a proactive guardian of IT systems, leveraging automation and monitoring to ensure stability and efficiency.

project.title: Automate System Health Checks & Reporting
project.description: Develop a set of scripts to automate daily system health checks (CPU, memory, disk usage, service status) on multiple servers. Generate a summary report and configure alerts for critical thresholds.
project.deliverable: Automation scripts (e.g., PowerShell/Bash), a sample daily health report, and documentation for alert configurations.
seeded_errors: The automation script fails to correctly parse log files for specific error messages, leading to missed critical alerts for a failing service.

scenario.title: Diagnosing High CPU Usage on a Production Server
Investigating a Failed Login Attempt Spike

science.desc: A critical database server is showing unusually high I/O wait times, impacting application performance. Describe your steps to identify the root cause and mitigate the issue.
You are tasked with setting up a new backup solution for critical business data. What factors would you consider, what type of backup would you recommend, and how would you ensure its reliability?

laugh_test.reason: Laugh test passed — filler ratio 20% (6/30). Full JD validation pending.

no_spectators.reason: No spectator violations — every skill has applied activities

dag_clean.reason: DAG clean — 30 unique skills, all prerequisites backward-only

ai_first.reason: AI-first check passed — all milestones have multi-layer AI work
